info.name: SWP QA Tool - Happy Case
info.description: Happy-case test suite với JSON Schema validation cho tất cả responses. Dùng dữ liệu thật từ SQL Server qua API, không fake data đọc. Một số API Create/Update sẽ tạo dữ liệu mới để phục vụ luồng test end-to-end.

exec: const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['accessToken', 'expiresAtUtc', 'user'], properties: { accessToken: { type: 'string' }, expiresAtUtc: { type: 'string' }, user: { type: 'object' } } };
const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['accessToken', 'expiresAtUtc', 'user'], properties: { accessToken: { type: 'string' }, expiresAtUtc: { type: 'string' }, user: { type: 'object' } } };
const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['accessToken', 'expiresAtUtc', 'user'], properties: { accessToken: { type: 'string' }, expiresAtUtc: { type: 'string' }, user: { type: 'object' } } };

pm.test('Response schema - Empty body', () => { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['raw'], properties: { raw: { type: 'string', maxLength: 0 } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple({ raw: pm.response.text() }, schema).valid).to.be.true; });

pm.test('Response schema - Empty body', () => { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['raw'], properties: { raw: { type: 'string', maxLength: 0 } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple({ raw: pm.response.text() }, schema).valid).to.be.true; });

pm.test('Response schema - Add Member', () => { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['message'], properties: { message: { type: 'string' } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(res, schema).valid).to.be.true; });

pm.test('Response schema - Empty body', () => { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['raw'], properties: { raw: { type: 'string', maxLength: 0 } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple({ raw: pm.response.text() }, schema).valid).to.be.true; });

pm.test('Response schema - Empty body', () => { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['raw'], properties: { raw: { type: 'string', maxLength: 0 } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple({ raw: pm.response.text() }, schema).valid).to.be.true; });
pm.test('Response is array or has items property', () => { pm.expect(arr).to.be.an('array'); });

pm.test('Response schema - Notifications', () => { pm.expect(Array.isArray(arr)).to.be.true; if(arr.length > 0){ const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['notificationId'], properties: { notificationId: { type: 'string' }, message: { type: 'string' }, isRead: { type: 'boolean' } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(arr[0], schema).valid).to.be.true; } });

pm.test('Response schema - Mark Read', () => { const text = pm.response.text(); if(text){ pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(pm.response.json(), { type: 'object' }).valid).to.be.true; } else { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['raw'], properties: { raw: { type: 'string', maxLength: 0 } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple({ raw: text }, schema).valid).to.be.true; } });

pm.test('Response schema - Supervisor Groups', () => { pm.expect(Array.isArray(arr)).to.be.true; if(arr.length > 0){ const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['groupId'], properties: { groupId: { type: 'string' }, groupName: { type: 'string' } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(arr[0], schema).valid).to.be.true; } });

pm.test('Response schema - Questions By Group', () => { pm.expect(Array.isArray(arr)).to.be.true; if(arr.length > 0){ const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['questionId', 'title', 'status'], properties: { questionId: { type: 'string' }, title: { type: 'string' }, status: { type: 'string' } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(arr[0], schema).valid).to.be.true; } });

pm.test('Response schema - My Questions', () => { pm.expect(Array.isArray(arr)).to.be.true; if(arr.length > 0){ const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['questionId', 'title', 'status'], properties: { questionId: { type: 'string' }, title: { type: 'string' }, status: { type: 'string' } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(arr[0], schema).valid).to.be.true; } });

pm.test('Response schema - Rejected Question', () => { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['questionId', 'status'], properties: { questionId: { type: 'string' }, status: { type: 'string' } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(res, schema).valid).to.be.true; });

pm.test('Response schema - Approved Question', () => { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['questionId', 'status'], properties: { questionId: { type: 'string' }, status: { type: 'string' } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(res, schema).valid).to.be.true; });

pm.test('Response schema - Question Detail', () => { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['questionId', 'title', 'status'], properties: { questionId: { type: 'string' }, title: { type: 'string' }, status: { type: 'string' } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(res, schema).valid).to.be.true; });

pm.test('Response schema - Update Rejected', () => { const text = pm.response.text(); if(text){ pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(pm.response.json(), { type: 'object' }).valid).to.be.true; } else { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['raw'], properties: { raw: { type: 'string', maxLength: 0 } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple({ raw: text }, schema).valid).to.be.true; } });

pm.test('Response schema - Reviewer Questions', () => { pm.expect(Array.isArray(arr)).to.be.true; if(arr.length > 0){ const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['questionId', 'title', 'status'], properties: { questionId: { type: 'string' }, title: { type: 'string' }, status: { type: 'string' } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(arr[0], schema).valid).to.be.true; } });

pm.test('Response schema - Reviewer Question Detail', () => { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['questionId', 'title', 'status'], properties: { questionId: { type: 'string' }, title: { type: 'string' }, status: { type: 'string' } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(res, schema).valid).to.be.true; });

pm.test('Response schema - Answered Question', () => { const schema = { type: 'object', required: ['questionId', 'status'], properties: { questionId: { type: 'string' }, status: { type: 'string' }, answer: { type: 'object' }, answers: { type: 'array' } } }; pm.expect(tv4.validateMultiple(res, schema).valid).to.be.true; });
